title: Clarification on 3I in EoE
wikitext:
[]: Clarification on 3I in EoE             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Mon Apr 13, 2009 4:23 am I'm a bit fuzzy on to certain elements of 3I as shown in EoE. Eva 01 woke up and thus possessing the Fruit of Life (S2 Engine) and being born of the Seed of Knowledge and thus becoming the Tree of Life, which is in a sense a "merging of Adam and Lilith), what was the point of GNR taking form? Was it two form of Instrumentality taking place (Gendo's and SEELE's respectively), was it to uncover the Black Moon/Egg to contain the souls of humanity? I'm a bit lost and some of this might have been lost in translation. I'm sure I'm probably overlooking something that's right under my nose...but I'll admit I can be a bit slow.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Mon Apr 13, 2009 4:51 am GNR is just there to suck things into her gaping vulvae. As for the other questions, look around at some old threads. I'd dig some up for you but I don't care enough and, dude, they're all the way over there. Also, I lol'd at your screen name.

[]:             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Mon Apr 13, 2009 4:54 am Thanks, I'll keep looking. On the screen name, also thanks, I intended it to be funny.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Mon Apr 13, 2009 5:05 am Actually, if you go to http://forum.evageeks.org/thread_lists/Evangelion_Discussion__threads.html and ctrl-f search for "impact", "black moon", or "GNR" you'll find plenty of stuff.
